info.english_meaning: to investigate to search to cleanse to purify
info.hindI_arTa: anvezaRa karanA QUMQanA svacCa karanA SudDa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' anvezaRerTe mfgayeta RO yO mArgerBavenmArgati mArgayecca ' (Slo. 44) iti devaH
